settings.title: The Collaborative Journey
settings.subtitle: From first brief to final delivery — a process built on craft, clarity, and care.

settings.title: Discovery & Briefing
settings.body: We begin by listening. Through a structured brief, we explore your brand's root — its values, its audience, and the story it needs to tell. This is where the journey begins.

settings.title: Tactile Concepts & Structural Design
settings.body: Our team translates your brief into tangible material concepts. We explore finishes, structures, and opening mechanics — presenting mood boards and CAD drawings for your review.

settings.title: Prototyping & Material Selection
settings.body: You receive physical prototypes. Touch them. Feel the damping of the lid, the weight of the board. Refinements happen here — before a single production unit is committed.

settings.title: Artisan Production & Global Delivery
settings.body: Our Guangzhou facility brings the approved design to life at scale, with full quality oversight. FSC-certified materials, Disney-audited processes, and delivery to your door worldwide.
